why_failed: ICIR 4.37 优秀但信号年化波动 28%→Sharpe 0.457；barra_l3 死胡同(行业聚类 0.44)；宽窗口(10d)反而恶化 ICIR→3.34、Sharpe→0.42

code_summary: 3-month exponential-decay + turnover-weighted average daily return reversal, with cs_demean + vol scaling enhancement in Round 6.
why_failed: Alpha entirely trapped in long-short spread. Long-only portfolio loads heavily on bear-market beta. 3-month turnover-weighted return reversal has structurally decayed in post-2016 A-shares.

code_summary: 主力净流入率反转 = -(mf_buy_lg+mf_buy_elg-mf_sell_lg-mf_sell_elg)/(sum of all four). 日频原始比率，无平滑。
why_failed: ICIR优秀(4.23)但MDD=-43%导致Calmar=0.389差0.011未达标。日频调仓(1D)+decay=5为最佳参数组合。

code_summary: 主力流出占比 = -(大单卖出额+超大单卖出额)/成交额，后引入5日ts_mean平滑。
why_failed: 2017-2018年结构性超长回撤(-45%, 607天)导致calmar仅0.25-0.26，远低于threshold 0.4。参数与公式微调均无法改善。华泰报告原文亦提示'2017年后回撤较大'。

code_summary: 1.0 / panel['pb'] — pure BP; then log_bp * (-momentum_20d) — failed; then bp.where(pe_ttm > 0) — profit filter
why_failed: Pure BP suffers structural 2017-2018 'beautiful 50' drawdown (-41%) invariant to params, weak quality filters, and momentum overlays. Calmar stuck at 0.31-0.34, unreachable threshold 0.4.

code_summary: Direct use of dv_ttm (dividend yield TTM) as a value factor with barra_ind_size neutralization. Also tried DP×ROE quality overlay (inc_n_income_attr_p / bs_total_hldr_eqy_exc_min_int) which destroyed predictive power (raw IC dropped 23%, pos_ratio from 60.3% to 54.3%).
why_failed: Pure DP suffers invariant 2017-2018 beautiful 50 regime drawdown (2017-10-10 to 2018-10-18). All strategy params (decay 15→10, top_k 100→150) have zero or negative effect on Calmar. Quality-overlay DP×ROE degrades IC. Calmar consistently 0.36-0.40, never reaches 0.4 threshold.

code_summary: -abs(phi) * mom where phi=rolling AR(1) autocorr of daily returns, mom=20-day cumulative return. A-share daily autocorr lacks cross-sectional variance to support regime switching.
why_failed: Structural 2017-2018 drawdown (-48% to -52%) invariant across all parameter combos; AR(1) regime proxy fails in A-share daily data.

code_summary: -ts_corr(close*adj_factor, turnover_rate, 10): 过去10日复权收盘价与换手率的Pearson相关系数取负。量价背离(负相关)预期未来高收益。
why_failed: LS-alpha trap: ICIR=3.40极强但detailed Calmar最高仅0.331，MDD>35%。多头端区分度弱，alpha主要来自空头。研报已预警'熊市强牛市弱'的结构性风险。

LS-alpha trap: ICIR=7.7 but alpha concentrated in short side; long-only cannot extract sufficient alpha after transaction costs. Short window (5d) + 1D rebalance yields turnover=135%+, cost_drag=14.5% eats all alpha.

code_summary: Best variant: original negative chip_profit, chip_window=120, top50_1W_d3; simple passed but detailed Calmar failed due costs/drawdown. Final 60d attempt was killed before evaluation.
why_failed: Fast-decay chip-profit reversal needed concentrated weekly trading; detailed costs plus 2016-2018 drawdown collapsed Calmar below threshold.

code_summary: Panic-selling reversal: -ts_pct_change(adj_low, ret_window) * ts_mean(turnover,5)/ts_mean(turnover,20). Tried ret_window=7/20/60, decay=9/12/15.
why_failed: Structural regime trap: invariant 2016-2018 drawdown (-48% to -53%) across all window lengths. Excellent ICIR (3.34-3.55) and monotonicity (0.81-0.92) but Calmar stuck at 0.14-0.21. Original BRAIN alpha size exposure masked as behavioral alpha.

code_summary: cs_rank(open / close - 1) intraday open-close reversal with barra_ind_size neutralization; initial decay=15, repaired to decay=5.
why_failed: Strong IC/simple alpha was not executable: detailed annual turnover reached 299x, fees consumed 144.5% of initial capital, and detailed annual return fell to -10.3%.

code_summary: -rank(ts_std(turnover_rate, 20)) + rank(ts_delta(bs_undistr_porfit / total_share, 60)); balance-sheet leg expanded event-driven with T+1 PIT delay.
Numerically stable sigmoid for a factor Series.
